title: Objects, Prototypes, Properties, and Data Shape · Runtime Trace: Object Properties
summary: Model service records and shared behavior while defending against accidental mutation and unsafe property input. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js object properties increment in a validated service-record domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, read, update, delete, enumerate, and compute properties while distinguishing own and inherited state.
Use generators for lazy staged iteration while handling inputs, return, throw, and cleanup behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
